chains.description: AL series 3/8" pitch leaf chain, 6 plates wide × 22 lacing. Light forklift mast and hoist applications.
AL series 1/2" pitch leaf chain, 8-wide × 44 lacing. Forklift mast applications.
AL series leaf chain for forklift mast applications. 10 plates wide, 22 lacing.
AL series 1" pitch leaf chain, 10 plates wide × 44 lacing. Heavy forklift mast applications.
AL series 3/4" pitch leaf chain, 12-wide × 66 lacing. Heavy-duty forklift mast applications.
BL series 3/8" pitch leaf chain. Thicker plates than AL for higher working loads.
BL series 3/8" pitch leaf chain, heavy lacing (44) for high working load forklift mast applications.
BL series 1/2" pitch, 8-wide × 46 lacing leaf chain for medium-duty forklift mast.
BL1022 heavy-series leaf chain, 31.75 mm (1.25 in) pitch, 2x2 lacing. Link plates and pins only — runs over sheaves, not sprockets. For lifting, balancing and linear motion applications.
chains.uniking_notes: PKG-01f. Catalog-verified. Tsubaki published min tensile 31700 lb exceeds ANSI min. Plate height + weight via 01f addendum (Code). [provenance: catalog-verified]
chains._superseded_by: tsubaki_pkg01 (richer data merged; original chain_id kept)

chains.description: BL series heavy leaf chain for maximum load forklift mast and hoist applications.
BL series 3/4" pitch leaf chain for heavy forklift mast and large hoist applications.
BL series 1" pitch leaf chain, 16 plates wide × 34 lacing for heavy industrial hoist applications.
BL series 1-1/4" pitch leaf chain, 20-wide × 34 lacing for very heavy industrial hoists.
BL series 1-1/4" pitch heavy leaf chain, 20-wide × 46 lacing. Maximum load heavy industrial hoist.

BL422 heavy-series leaf chain, 12.7 mm (0.5 in) pitch, 2x2 lacing. Link plates and pins only — runs over sheaves, not sprockets. For lifting, balancing and linear motion: forklift masts, hoists, counterweights.
